prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ELSHCBM24X18I-XL-GRN Product Type: CUTTING_BOARD Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: DIY Craft Engineering Self Healing Cutting Mat Double Sided Green, 18x24 Description: The Extra Large Self Healing Cutting Mat is a great addition to any hobbyist's supplies collection.

The Extra Large Cutting Board Mat is constructed of a special PVC material that will heal cuts as you make them. This will extend the lifetime of the board, and will last much longer than your average cutting mat. The extra large size of this mat (24 inch x 18 inch) is perfect for just about any project, and the non-slip material will ensure you have a safe work surface. Each mat is double sided, with basic measurements, rulers and a grid.

Make sure to grab one of these before your next craft project, or gift one to your favorite hobbyist. Search Terms: crafting hobby tool supplies cutting mat chopping dicing arts and crafts self healing boards craft mat crafting workspace DIY tools accessories green double sided gridded cutting Features: - Self Healing PVC Material | Small Cuts in Material, Heal Them Self - Ideal for Precision Cutting Projects, Hobby and Craft DIY, Quilting and more - Non-Slip Material Ensures Safe Work Surface - Double Sided with Basic Measurements, Rulers & Grids - Dimensions: 24 inch x 18 inch === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 24x18 Green Self Healing Cutting Mat
